summary: Backend-only tests for the new 2FA + trusted-device + permanent IP ban + owner security endpoints + purge-dummy-data. 11/11 pytest cases passed against the public URL.
action_items: Re-seed demo drivers (07801111111/07802222222) after purge tests — done via seed_delivery_flow_demo.py; consider auto re-seed or excluding by id-list env for repeatable QA.
GET /api/super-admin/blocked-ips uses key 'blocked' (not blocked_ips); consider standardising the field name for API consumers.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has grown very large (>25k lines). Split login/2FA/owner-security into a dedicated router module for maintainability.

dev_code is returned in production-shaped responses whenever pending_delivery=true — ensure this branch is gated behind ENVIRONMENT!=production (currently gated by SMTP/Twilio not configured, which is acceptable but fragile).
seed_data_creation: Re-ran seed_delivery_flow_demo.py to restore demo-drv-1/2 after purge-dummy-data test deleted them.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 2FA flows (staff/owner/driver), trusted-device bypass, wrong/reused code rejection, permanent IP ban via X-Forwarded-For=203.0.113.77 (5 fails -> 403), owner list/unblock, security-status (twilio_configured=false, max_login_fails=5), pending-2fa-codes with dev_code, trusted-devices list + revoke, and purge-dummy-data (dry_run then real) all verified. Response privacy confirmed: no destination_masked/email/phone leaked in 2FA-required responses. IMPORTANT: Purge test deletes demo-drv-1/2 — re-seed with `python3 /app/backend/seed_delivery_flow_demo.py` before re-running driver tests.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no failing functionality. Initial run had a parser miss on blocked-ips field name ('blocked' vs 'blocked_ips'); fixed in test.
